creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
There are also these related errors:

> Error: /usr/local/lib/rstudio/bin/rsession is linked to /usr/local/lib/R/lib/libRblas.so which does not have a SONAME.  math/R needs to be fixed.
> Error: /usr/local/lib/rstudio/bin/rsession is linked to /usr/local/lib/R/lib/libR.so which does not have a SONAME.  math/R needs to be fixed.
